scriptsReadmeCreated.summary: Naming convention: verify-*, audit-*, diagnose-*, plan-*, trial-*, evaluate-*, validate-*, test-*, export-*, seed-*, import-*, confirm-*, abandon-*, rollback-*, fix-*, repair-*, backfill-*, cleanup-*, implement-*, dry-run-*, etc. Rule of thumb: any non-read-only-prefix is likely write-capable.
